title: The boat ride to Ios, Greece July 2010

transcript.text: Gettin' on the boat to Ios. Gettin' on the boat to Ios. The ferry to Ios.
We've got a little cafeteria area here. I'm still lookin' for my seat. I don't know where I am.
Pretty awesome, you can see a movie though.
This is Athens from the deck of the boat going towards Ios. It's about 6.45. I didn't sleep at all last night. I just hung out doing the computer on the place all night long.
Sailboat. I can't see it. It's over somewhere. Here's my breakfast for 8 euro 50. Got juice on that.
And this is where I'm staying for 6 euro. The food. The bar. There's even a water slide.
I used to be to a fire. I can't think of this. Just off the main street.
But here's the island. Drinking the strawberry daiquiris too for 6 euro. I think I'm gonna drink them in the pool.
